add.usage:
Please specify a user to add.
**Usage:** `ticket add <user>`
add.noPermission: You don't have permission to add users to this ticket.
add.alreadyHasAccess: {user} already has access to this ticket.
add.addedBody: {user} has been added to this ticket by {adder}.
add.failed: Failed to add the user. Please check permissions and try again.

addcategory.duplicateName: A category with this name already exists.
addcategory.addedBody: **{name}** has been added to the ticket system.
addcategory.promptBody: Click below to add a new ticket category.

addrole.usage:
Please specify a role to add.
**Usage:** `ticket addrole <@role>`
addrole.roleNotFound: The specified role could not be found.
addrole.roleNotAllowed: This role cannot be used as a support role.
addrole.addedBody:
{role} has been added as a support role.
**All support roles:** {roleList}

claim.invalidTicket: This channel is not a valid ticket.
claim.noPermission: You don't have permission to claim tickets.
claim.ownTicket: You cannot claim your own ticket.
claim.deleted: This ticket has been deleted and cannot be claimed.
claim.closed: This ticket is closed. Please reopen it before claiming.
claim.alreadyClaimed: This ticket has already been claimed by {user}.
claim.claimedBody: This ticket has been claimed by {user}.

close.noPermission: You don't have permission to close this ticket.
close.failed: Failed to close the ticket. Please try again.

delete.channelNotFound: The specified channel could not be found.
delete.noPermission: Only support staff can delete tickets.
delete.selfDeleteBody: This ticket channel will be deleted in 5 seconds...
delete.failed: Failed to delete the ticket channel.

open.noPermission: Only support staff can reopen tickets.
open.failed: Failed to reopen the ticket. Please try again.

panel.noCategories: No ticket categories found. Please run setup again.
panel.channelNotFound: Panel channel not found. Please reconfigure.
panel.failed: Failed to send ticket panel. Please check channel permissions.

remove.usage:
Please specify a user to remove.
**Usage:** `ticket remove <user>`
remove.noPermission: You don't have permission to remove users from this ticket.
remove.cannotRemoveCreator: You cannot remove the ticket creator.
remove.noAccess: {user} does not have access to this ticket.
remove.removedBody: {user} has been removed from this ticket.
remove.failed: Failed to remove the user. Please check permissions and try again.

removerole.usage:
Please specify a role to remove.
**Usage:** `ticket removerole <@role>`
removerole.cannotRemovePrimary: Cannot remove the primary support role. Use `ticket reset` and reconfigure to change it.
removerole.notAdditional: {role} is not an additional support role.
removerole.removedBody:
{role} has been removed from support roles.
**Remaining support roles:** {roleList}

rename.usage:
Please specify a new name.
**Usage:** `ticket rename <new-name>`
rename.noPermission: Only support staff can rename tickets.
rename.invalidName: Invalid name. Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
rename.sameName: The new name is the same as the current name.
rename.renamedBody: This ticket has been renamed to `{name}`
rename.failed: Failed to rename the ticket channel.
rename.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Please wait before renaming again.

reset.notConfigured: Ticket system is not configured. Nothing to reset.
reset.confirmBody:
> This will delete all ticket configuration, categories, and support role assignments for this server.
> **Warning:** Existing ticket channels will not be deleted, but the system will stop functioning until you run setup again.
reset.doneBody: All ticket configuration has been removed. You can now run `ticket setup` to configure the system again.
reset.failed: Failed to reset the ticket system. Please try again.

transcript.noPermission: Only support staff can use this command.
transcript.sentBody: The transcript has been sent to the ticket creator and log channel.

transfer.usage:
Please specify a staff member to transfer to.
**Usage:** `ticket transfer <user>`
transfer.noPermission: Only support staff can transfer tickets.
transfer.notClaimed: This ticket has not been claimed yet. Use `ticket claim` first.
transfer.notClaimantOrAdmin: Only the current claimant or an administrator can transfer this ticket.
transfer.sameUser: This ticket is already claimed by that user.
transfer.targetNotStaff: The target user is not a support staff member.
transfer.transferredBody: This ticket has been transferred from {from} to {to}.
transfer.failed: Failed to transfer the ticket. Please try again.

setup.alreadyConfigured: Ticket system is already configured. Use `ticket reset` first to clear the current configuration before running setup again.
setup.errorBody: An error occurred during setup. Please try again.
setup.requirementsBody: Missing text channels or assignable roles. Please ensure the bot has proper permissions.
setup.completeBody: Use `ticket addcategory` to add ticket categories, then `ticket panel` to send the panel.
setup.failed: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.

language.notSupported: That is not a supported language. Choose `en` or `vi`.

This server's current language is **{language}**.
Use `/language set <en|vi>` to change it.
language.noPermission: You need the **Manage Server** permission to change the server language.
language.usage:
Please provide a language.

**Usage:** `language set <en|vi>` or `language view`

farewell.noPermission: You need **Administrator** permission to use this command.
farewell.alreadyConfiguredBody: > Use `farewell config` to modify or `farewell reset` to start over.
farewell.setupPrompt:
Choose the type of farewell message you want to create:

**Simple**
Send a plain text farewell message. You can use placeholders to personalize it.

**Container**
Send a farewell message in a container format. You can customize the embed with a title, description, image, etc.

Antinuke has been reset to default settings and **disabled**.

All whitelisted users have been removed.

Use `/antinuke setup` to configure again.

browse.title: Shop
browse.empty: This server doesn't have any products for sale yet.
browse.footer: Select a product below to view details and purchase.

buy.productNotFound: That product could not be found. It may have been removed.
buy.productInactive: That product is not currently available for purchase.
buy.outOfStock: Sorry, that product is out of stock.
buy.noVndPrice: This product doesn't have a VND price set, so PayOS isn't available for it.
buy.noUsdPrice: This product doesn't have a USD price set, so this payment method isn't available for it.
buy.payosNotConfigured: PayOS payments aren't configured on this bot yet. Please try another payment method or contact a server admin.
buy.paypalNotConfigured: PayPal payments aren't configured on this bot yet. Please try another payment method or contact a server admin.
buy.cryptoNotConfigured: No crypto wallet is configured for that asset yet. Please try another payment method or contact a server admin.
buy.paymentFailed: Failed to start the payment. Please try again in a moment.

orders.title: Your Orders
orders.empty: You haven't placed any orders yet. Use `/shop browse` to see what's available.

redeem.usage: Enter a coupon code to check if it's valid before checkout.
redeem.inactive: That coupon is no longer active.
redeem.exhausted: That coupon has reached its maximum number of uses.
redeem.valid: Coupon **{code}** is valid: {discount} off. Use `/shop buy` and it will be applied automatically at checkout.

category.notFound: No category found with that name.
category.listEmpty: No categories yet. Add one with `/shop category add`.

product.notFound: No product found with that name.
product.listEmpty: No products yet. Add one with `/shop product add`.

coupon.listEmpty: No coupons yet. Add one with `/shop coupon add`.
